历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5039 → 5042 → 4335 → 1923 → 1634. Starting from 2024, the ranking significantly improved (from 4335 to 1923), and further rose to 1634 in 2025, with a cumulative advancement of about 2700 positions over the past two years, reflecting a notable increase in application popularity. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1634. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 45 in 2021 → 44 in 2022 → 44 in 2023 → 41 in 2024 → 37 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 32, a further reduction of 5 students (-13.5%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, consistently among the top 25 nationally, a top-tier engineering institution. 4. [Reputation Heat] The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but the impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (average), but labels such as 'Defense Seven Sons' and 'Cradle of Chief Engineers' continue to attract high-scoring candidates; no significant admission gaps recorded; disciplines including Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, and 7 other A- or above disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors, with strong appeal of flagship programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended popular majors, highly overlapping with the university's advantageous disciplines. The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province grew from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with a total of 267,900 candidates in 2026. Estimated at about 204,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of approximately 76%, the competition base expands with minor fluctuations. The university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, involving cross-provincial enrollment; Fujian Province is not a major local source province, with recent enrollment proportion around 3%-5%, and no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend in rankings from 2024-2025, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 13.5% intensifying competition, the continuous increase of about 6% in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province, and the high recommendation of flagship majors such as Aerospace/Computer Science, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1532, with a range of 1348–1716.
